jobs.title: Pre-Sales Application Engineer – Critical Power
jobs.description:
About us
Centiel is a Switzerland-based technology company that develops, manufactures, and supplies power protection solutions for critical infrastructure. Its product portfolio includes uninterruptible power supply (UPS) systems designed to support operational continuity and energy efficiency. The company builds on engineering expertise in transformer-less and modular UPS technologies. Centiel operates through a network of subsidiaries and channel partners to serve customers in various international markets. Centiel (CNTL) is listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.

Note: In line with our strategic growth, we are proactively collecting applications for this position as part of a forward-looking recruiting initiative. This means we are evaluating candidate profiles today to anticipate future hiring needs aligned with our development plans.

 

Who we are looking for

We are looking for a technically strong and customer-oriented Pre-sales Application Engineer to support our Sales organization. The ideal candidate is able to translate customer needs into effective technical solutions and contribute to winning competitive bids.

You will be involved in the pre-sales phase, from customer requirement analysis to technical solution design, quotation support, and tender preparation, contributing directly to customer satisfaction and the growth of Centiel’s global business.

Contract details

Permanent full-time contract (100%)
Starting date: TBD
Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), with occasional travel
Reporting to: VP Data Center Solutions – Critical Power

 

Scope of the role

This position is accountable for supporting the sales process by analysing customer requirements, designing and configuring technical UPS and power protection solutions, preparing competitive offers, and ensuring that requirements are clearly understood and translated into feasible, accurate, and commercially strong proposals.

The role also ensures a clear technical handover to Project Management once a project is awarded.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Responsibilities

Analyze customer requirements and develop technically sound UPS and power protection solutions aligned with customer needs and Centiel product standards.
Prepare accurate technical proposals, costings, and tender documents to support competitive offers.
Collaborate with Sales to strengthen value propositions, improve offer quality, and increase conversion rates.
Engage with customers to clarify technical needs, explain proposed solutions, and build confidence in Centiel’s technical approach.
Coordinate with suppliers and partners to secure competitive pricing, technical input, and delivery conditions.
Support a clear technical handover to Project Management once a project is awarded.

 

 

Candidate profile
Qualifications, Skills & Experience

Degree in Electrical Engineering, Power Engineering, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience
Experience in pre-sales, application engineering, or technical sales within a technical environment
Experience in preparing quotations, technical documentation, tender material, or customer-facing technical proposals is an advantage
Strong analytical skills with the ability to design and optimize technical solutions
Accuracy and attention to detail in preparing technical offers, costings, and project-related documentation
Customer-oriented mindset with strong communication and presentation skills
Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear and compelling proposals
Proactive, solution-driven, and results-oriented approach
Experience in UPS, power protection, or datacenter industry is a strong plus
Proficiency with MS Office; experience with CRM, quotation tools, or similar systems is an advantage
Strong English language skills; additional European languages are an asset

 

Company values & behavioural competencies

At Centiel, our values guide both our decisions and our daily behaviour.

They define who we are and how we act — shaping the way we work together, serve our customers, and drive innovation.

Safety, integrity, respect, teamwork – act with honesty and care for people and the environment.
Own it – act with urgency – take responsibility, make things happen, and deliver with commitment.
Foster a customer-first mindset – listen, anticipate needs, and create lasting value through service excellence.
Lead by example – drive continuous improvement – challenge the status quo and share knowledge to grow together.
Think big and execute – combine ambition and discipline to turn ideas into tangible results.

 

Every Centiel employee is expected to embody these values through proactive problem-solving, transparent collaboration, and a continuous desire to learn, improve, and contribute positively to our culture and brand.

 

 

Expected results in the first 6–12 months

Deliver accurate, high-quality technical proposals aligned with customer needs, tender requirements, and Centiel product standards
Actively support sales in increasing win rates and closing key opportunities
Improve quotation turnaround times and responsiveness to customer requests
Strengthen collaboration with sales, engineering, and external partners

Ensure smooth, complete, and structured technical handover of won projects to Project Management.
 

What we offer

Fair salary in line with the responsibilities of the role
Flexibility and attention to personal needs in relation to professional activity
Autonomy in carrying out tasks
Stimulating, open, and inclusive work environment
Workplace conveniently located near public transport, with covered parking, showers and changing rooms, and close to natural trails that make it easy to combine work with sports activities.

How to apply
If you identify with this role and are interested in joining us, please send your application, indicating “Pre-sales Application Engineer – Critical Power” in the subject line, and include your CV and relevant certificates to:    hr@hq.centiel.com.

titleByLocale.it: Ingegnere di applicazione Pre-Sales – Potere critico
titleByLocale.fr: Ingénieur d'application avant la vente – Puissance critique

descriptionByLocale.en:
## About us
Centiel is a Switzerland-based technology company that develops, manufactures, and supplies power protection solutions for critical infrastructure. Its product portfolio includes uninterruptible power supply (UPS) systems designed to support operational continuity and energy efficiency. The company builds on engineering expertise in transformer-less and modular UPS technologies. Centiel operates through a network of subsidiaries and channel partners to serve customers in various international markets. Centiel (CNTL) is listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.

Note: In line with our strategic growth, we are proactively collecting applications for this position as part of a forward-looking recruiting initiative. This means we are evaluating candidate profiles today to anticipate future hiring needs aligned with our development plans.

## Who we are looking for
We are looking for a technically strong and customer-oriented Pre-sales Application Engineer to support our Sales organization. The ideal candidate is able to translate customer needs into effective technical solutions and contribute to winning competitive bids.

You will be involved in the pre-sales phase, from customer requirement analysis to technical solution design, quotation support, and tender preparation, contributing directly to customer satisfaction and the growth of Centiel’s global business.

## Contract details
- Permanent full-time contract (100%)
- Starting date: TBD
- Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), with occasional travel
- Reporting to: VP Data Center Solutions – Critical Power

## Scope of the role
This position is accountable for supporting the sales process by analysing customer requirements, designing and configuring technical UPS and power protection solutions, preparing competitive offers, and ensuring that requirements are clearly understood and translated into feasible, accurate, and commercially strong proposals.

The role also ensures a clear technical handover to Project Management once a project is awarded.

## Responsibilities
- Analyze customer requirements and develop technically sound UPS and power protection solutions aligned with customer needs and Centiel product standards.
- Prepare accurate technical proposals, costings, and tender documents to support competitive offers.
- Collaborate with Sales to strengthen value propositions, improve offer quality, and increase conversion rates.
- Engage with customers to clarify technical needs, explain proposed solutions, and build confidence in Centiel’s technical approach.
- Coordinate with suppliers and partners to secure competitive pricing, technical input, and delivery conditions.
- Support a clear technical handover to Project Management once a project is awarded.

## Candidate profile
### Qualifications, Skills & Experience
- Degree in Electrical Engineering, Power Engineering, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience
- Experience in pre-sales, application engineering, or technical sales within a technical environment
- Experience in preparing quotations, technical documentation, tender material, or customer-facing technical proposals is an advantage
- Strong analytical skills with the ability to design and optimize technical solutions
- Accuracy and attention to detail in preparing technical offers, costings, and project-related documentation
- Customer-oriented mindset with strong communication and presentation skills
- Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear and compelling proposals
- Proactive, solution-driven, and results-oriented approach
- Experience in UPS, power protection, or datacenter industry is a strong plus
- Proficiency with MS Office; experience with CRM, quotation tools, or similar systems is an advantage
- Strong English language skills; additional European languages are an asset

## Company values & behavioural competencies
At Centiel, our values guide both our decisions and our daily behaviour.

They define who we are and how we act — shaping the way we work together, serve our customers, and drive innovation.

- Safety, integrity, respect, teamwork – act with honesty and care for people and the environment.
- Own it – act with urgency – take responsibility, make things happen, and deliver with commitment.
- Foster a customer-first mindset – listen, anticipate needs, and create lasting value through service excellence.
- Lead by example – drive continuous improvement – challenge the status quo and share knowledge to grow together.
- Think big and execute – combine ambition and discipline to turn ideas into tangible results.

Every Centiel employee is expected to embody these values through proactive problem-solving, transparent collaboration, and a continuous desire to learn, improve, and contribute positively to our culture and brand.

## Expected results in the first 6–12 months
- Deliver accurate, high-quality technical proposals aligned with customer needs, tender requirements, and Centiel product standards
- Actively support sales in increasing win rates and closing key opportunities
- Improve quotation turnaround times and responsiveness to customer requests
- Strengthen collaboration with sales, engineering, and external partners
- Ensure smooth, complete, and structured technical handover of won projects to Project Management.

## What we offer
- Fair salary in line with the responsibilities of the role
- Flexibility and attention to personal needs in relation to professional activity
- Autonomy in carrying out tasks
- Stimulating, open, and inclusive work environment
- Workplace conveniently located near public transport, with covered parking, showers and changing rooms, and close to natural trails that make it easy to combine work with sports activities.

## How to apply
If you identify with this role and are interested in joining us, please send your application, indicating “Pre-sales Application Engineer – Critical Power” in the subject line, and include your CV and relevant certificates to:    hr@hq.centiel.com.
descriptionByLocale.it:
#
Centiel è una società tecnologica svizzera che sviluppa, produce e fornisce soluzioni di protezione dell'energia per infrastrutture critiche. Il suo portafoglio di prodotti comprende sistemi di alimentazione senza interruzioni (UPS) progettati per supportare la continuità operativa e l'efficienza energetica. L'azienda si basa sulle competenze ingegneristiche nelle tecnologie UPS senza trasformatori e modulari. Centiel opera attraverso una rete di filiali e partner di canale per servire i clienti in vari mercati internazionali. Centiel (CNTL) è elencato sulla SIX Swiss Exchange.

Nota: In linea con la nostra crescita strategica, stiamo raccogliendo proattivamente applicazioni per questa posizione come parte di un'iniziativa di reclutamento in vista di futuro. Ciò significa che stiamo valutando i profili dei candidati oggi per anticipare i futuri bisogni di assunzione allineati con i nostri piani di sviluppo.

# Chi stiamo cercando #
Siamo alla ricerca di un tecnico forte e orientato al cliente Pre-sales Application Engineer per supportare la nostra organizzazione Vendite. Il candidato ideale è in grado di tradurre le esigenze dei clienti in soluzioni tecniche efficaci e contribuire a vincere offerte competitive.

Sarete coinvolti nella fase di pre-vendita, dall’analisi dei requisiti del cliente alla progettazione di soluzioni tecniche, al supporto di quotazione e alla preparazione tenera, contribuendo direttamente alla soddisfazione del cliente e alla crescita del business globale di Centiel.

## Dettagli del contratto
- Contratto permanente a tempo pieno (100%)
- Data di inizio: TBD
- Posto di lavoro: Cadro (Lugano), con viaggi occasionali
- Reporting a: VP Data Center Solutions – Critical Power

## Scopo del ruolo
Questa posizione è responsabile per sostenere il processo di vendita analizzando i requisiti del cliente, progettando e configurando le soluzioni tecniche UPS e di protezione della potenza, preparando le offerte competitive e garantendo che i requisiti siano chiaramente compresi e tradotti in proposte fattibili, accurate e commercialmente forti.

Il ruolo assicura anche una chiara consegna tecnica alla Project Management una volta che un progetto viene assegnato.

## Responsabilità
- Analizzare i requisiti dei clienti e sviluppare soluzioni tecniche di protezione UPS e di potenza allineate alle esigenze dei clienti e agli standard dei prodotti Centiel.
- Preparare proposte tecniche accurate, costi e documenti teneri per sostenere offerte competitive.
- Collaborare con le vendite per rafforzare le proposizioni di valore, migliorare la qualità dell'offerta e aumentare i tassi di conversione.
- Impegnarsi con i clienti per chiarire le esigenze tecniche, spiegare le soluzioni proposte e costruire fiducia nell’approccio tecnico di Centiel.
- Coordinare con fornitori e partner per garantire prezzi competitivi, input tecnici e condizioni di consegna.
- Sostenere una chiara consegna tecnica alla Project Management una volta che un progetto viene assegnato.

## Profilo del candidato
### Qualifiche, competenze e esperienza
- Laurea in ingegneria elettrica, ingegneria elettrica, un campo tecnico correlato, o esperienza pratica equivalente
- Esperienza in pre-vendita, ingegneria delle applicazioni o vendite tecniche all'interno di un ambiente tecnico
- L'esperienza nella preparazione di citazioni, documentazione tecnica, materiale tenero, o proposte tecniche orientate al cliente è un vantaggio
- Forte capacità analitiche con la capacità di progettare e ottimizzare le soluzioni tecniche
- Accuratezza e attenzione ai dettagli nella preparazione di offerte tecniche, costi e documentazione relativa al progetto
- mentalità orientata al cliente con forti capacità di comunicazione e presentazione
- Capacità di tradurre concetti tecnici complessi in proposte chiare e convincenti
- Approccio proattivo, orientato alla soluzione e ai risultati
- L'esperienza in UPS, la protezione della potenza o l'industria del datacenter è un vantaggio forte
- Proficienza con MS Office; esperienza con CRM, strumenti di quotazione, o sistemi simili è un vantaggio
- Forte conoscenza della lingua inglese; le lingue europee aggiuntive sono un bene

## Valori aziendali e competenze comportamentali
A Centiel, i nostri valori guidano sia le nostre decisioni che il nostro comportamento quotidiano.

Essi definiscono chi siamo e come agiamo — modellando il modo in cui lavoriamo insieme, servire i nostri clienti e guidare l'innovazione.

- Sicurezza, integrità, rispetto, lavoro di squadra – agire con onestà e cura per le persone e l'ambiente.
- Possedere – agire con urgenza – assumersi la responsabilità, far accadere le cose e consegnare con impegno.
- Foster a customer-first mindset – ascoltare, anticipare le esigenze e creare valore duraturo attraverso l'eccellenza del servizio.
- Guidare per esempio – guidare il miglioramento continuo – sfidare lo status quo e condividere la conoscenza per crescere insieme.
- Pensare grande ed eseguire – combinare ambizione e disciplina per trasformare le idee in risultati tangibili.

Ogni dipendente Centiel dovrebbe incarnare questi valori attraverso la risoluzione proattiva dei problemi, la collaborazione trasparente e il continuo desiderio di imparare, migliorare e contribuire positivamente alla nostra cultura e al nostro marchio.

## Risultati previsti nei primi 6-12 mesi
- Fornire proposte tecniche accurate e di alta qualità allineate alle esigenze del cliente, ai requisiti di offerta e agli standard dei prodotti Centiel
- Supporto attivo delle vendite in aumento dei tassi di vincita e delle opportunità chiave di chiusura
- Migliorare i tempi di consegna delle quote e la reattività alle richieste dei clienti
- Rafforzare la collaborazione con vendite, ingegneria e partner esterni
- Assicurare una consegna tecnica liscia, completa e strutturata di progetti vinti alla Project Management.

# Che cosa offriamo #
- Equo salario in linea con le responsabilità del ruolo
- Flessibilità e attenzione alle esigenze personali in relazione all'attività professionale
- Autonomia nello svolgimento delle attività
- Ambiente di lavoro stimolante, aperto e inclusivo
- Posto di lavoro situato vicino al trasporto pubblico, con parcheggio coperto, docce e spogliatoi, e vicino a sentieri naturali che rendono facile da combinare lavoro con attività sportive.

## Come applicare
Se ti identifichi con questo ruolo e sei interessato a unirti a noi, invia la tua domanda, indicando “Ingegnere di applicazione pre-vendita – Potere critico” nella riga dell'oggetto, e include il tuo CV e i relativi certificati a: hr@hq.centiel.com.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
À propos de nous
Centiel est une société technologique basée en Suisse qui développe, fabrique et fournit des solutions de protection de l'énergie pour les infrastructures critiques. Son portefeuille de produits comprend des systèmes d'alimentation sans interruption (UPS) conçus pour soutenir la continuité opérationnelle et l'efficacité énergétique. L'entreprise s'appuie sur l'expertise technique dans les technologies UPS sans transformateur et modulaires. Centiel opère par l'intermédiaire d'un réseau de filiales et de partenaires de canaux pour desservir ses clients sur divers marchés internationaux. Centiel (CNTL) est coté à la SIX Swiss Exchange.

Remarque : Conformément à notre croissance stratégique, nous recueillons proactivement des candidatures pour ce poste dans le cadre d'une initiative de recrutement tournée vers l'avenir. Cela signifie que nous évaluons aujourd'hui les profils des candidats afin d'anticiper les besoins futurs en matière d'embauche conformément à nos plans de développement.

Qui nous cherchons
Nous sommes à la recherche d'un ingénieur d'application prévente techniquement solide et orienté client pour soutenir notre organisation de vente. Le candidat idéal est en mesure de traduire les besoins du client en solutions techniques efficaces et de contribuer à l'obtention d'offres concurrentielles.

Vous participerez à la phase prévente, de l'analyse des besoins du client à la conception de solutions techniques, au soutien des devis et à la préparation des appels d'offres, contribuant directement à la satisfaction du client et à la croissance de l'activité mondiale de Centiel.

Détails du contrat
- Contrat à temps plein permanent (100%)
- Date de début: À déterminer
- Milieu de travail : Cadro (Lugano), voyage occasionnel
- Reportage à: VP Data Center Solutions – Puissance critique

## Portée du rôle
Cette position est responsable de soutenir le processus de vente en analysant les besoins des clients, en concevant et en configurant des solutions techniques UPS et de protection de l'énergie, en préparant des offres concurrentielles et en veillant à ce que les exigences soient clairement comprises et traduites en propositions réalisables, précises et commercialement solides.

Ce rôle assure également un transfert technique clair à la gestion de projet une fois qu'un projet est attribué.

Responsabilités
- Analyser les besoins du client et développer des solutions UPS et de protection de l'alimentation techniquement saines, adaptées aux besoins du client et aux normes de produits Centiel.
- Préparer des propositions techniques précises, des coûts et des documents d'appel d'offres pour soutenir les offres concurrentielles.
- Collaborer avec les ventes pour renforcer les propositions de valeur, améliorer la qualité des offres et augmenter les taux de conversion.
- S'engager auprès des clients pour clarifier les besoins techniques, expliquer les solutions proposées et renforcer la confiance dans l'approche technique de Centiel.
- Coordonner avec les fournisseurs et les partenaires pour obtenir des prix concurrentiels, des intrants techniques et des conditions de livraison.
- Soutenir un transfert technique clair à la gestion de projet une fois qu'un projet est attribué.

## Profil du candidat
### Qualifications, compétences et expérience
- Diplôme en génie électrique, génie électrique, domaine technique connexe ou expérience pratique équivalente
- Expérience en prévente, ingénierie d'application ou vente technique dans un environnement technique
- L'expérience dans la préparation des devis, la documentation technique, le matériel d'appel d'offres ou les propositions techniques orientées vers le client est un avantage
- Fortes compétences analytiques avec la capacité de concevoir et d'optimiser des solutions techniques
- Précision et attention aux détails dans la préparation des offres techniques, des coûts et de la documentation relative aux projets
- L'état d'esprit orienté vers le client avec de solides compétences de communication et de présentation
- Capacité de traduire des concepts techniques complexes en propositions claires et convaincantes
- Approche proactive, axée sur la solution et axée sur les résultats
- L'expérience dans l'industrie des UPS, de la protection de l'énergie ou des datacenters est un plus fort
- Compétence avec MS Office; l'expérience avec CRM, les outils de cotation ou des systèmes similaires est un avantage
- Fortes compétences en langue anglaise; d'autres langues européennes sont un atout

## Valeurs de l'entreprise et compétences comportementales
Chez Centiel, nos valeurs guident nos décisions et notre comportement quotidien.

Ils définissent qui nous sommes et comment nous agissons — façonner la façon dont nous travaillons ensemble, servir nos clients et stimuler l'innovation.

- Sécurité, intégrité, respect, travail d'équipe – agir avec honnêteté et soin pour les gens et l'environnement.
- Posséder - agir avec urgence - prendre la responsabilité, faire les choses arriver, et livrer avec engagement.
- Favoriser un premier état d'esprit client – écouter, anticiper les besoins et créer une valeur durable grâce à l'excellence du service.
- Diriger par l'exemple – stimuler l'amélioration continue – remettre en question le statu quo et partager les connaissances pour grandir ensemble.
- Penser grand et exécuter – combiner ambition et discipline pour transformer les idées en résultats tangibles.

Chaque employé de Centiel doit incarner ces valeurs par la résolution proactive de problèmes, la collaboration transparente et un désir continu d'apprendre, d'améliorer et de contribuer positivement à notre culture et à notre marque.

## Résultats attendus au cours des 6 à 12 premiers mois
- Fournir des propositions techniques précises et de haute qualité adaptées aux besoins des clients, aux exigences d'appel d'offres et aux normes de produits Centiel
- Soutenir activement les ventes en augmentant les taux de victoire et en fermant les principales opportunités
- Améliorer les délais de soumission et la réactivité aux demandes des clients
- Renforcer la collaboration avec les partenaires commerciaux, techniques et externes
- Assurer le transfert technique sans heurt, complet et structuré des projets gagnés à la gestion de projet.

Ce que nous offrons
- Salaire équitable en fonction des responsabilités du rôle
- Souplesse et attention aux besoins personnels par rapport à l'activité professionnelle
- Autonomie dans l'exécution des tâches
- Un environnement de travail stimulant, ouvert et inclusif
- le lieu de travail idéalement situé près des transports publics, avec parking couvert, douches et vestiaires, et à proximité des sentiers naturels qui rendent facile de combiner travail et activités sportives.

## Comment postuler
Si vous vous identifiez à ce rôle et que vous souhaitez vous joindre à nous, veuillez envoyer votre candidature en indiquant l'Ingénieur d'applications préventes – Puissance critique dans la ligne d'objet, et inclure votre CV et les certificats pertinents à: hr@hq.centiel.com.

jobs.title: Project Engineer – Centiel UK
jobs.description:
We're seeking a Project Engineer who delivers across all projects, ensuring work aligns with the agreed scope and schedule, and that commitments made during the sales stage are delivered as practical, achievable outcomes.

Reporting to the Head of Projects, you support structured project execution through effective planning, coordination, and resource management to ensure successful delivery.

This is a hybrid role, combining office and home working with frequent nationwide travel to customer sites.

Workplace: Hybrid (Alton, UK /Travel/Home office)

Reporting to: Head of Projects – Centiel UK

jobs.title: Research & Development Engineer
jobs.description:
To strengthen our product innovation, we are seeking a Research & Development Engineer with solid expertise in power electronics control and embedded systems for high-reliability industrial products (UPS or similar).

You are a hands-on engineer with strong analytical skills and lab practice, able to design, implement, and validate control algorithms and embedded firmware/hardware, collaborating closely with Production, Quality, and After-Sales to deliver robust features to market.

Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), with occasional travel

Reporting to: Head of R&D

Working rate: 100%

descriptionByLocale.it: Per rafforzare l'innovazione dei nostri prodotti, stiamo cercando un Ingegnere di Ricerca e Sviluppo con solide competenze in controllo elettronico di potenza e sistemi embedded per prodotti industriali ad alta affidabilit (UPS o simili). Siete un ingegnere pratico con forti abilit analitiche e pratica di laboratorio, in grado di progettare, implementare e validare algoritmi di controllo e firmware/hardware embedded, collaborando strettamente con Produzione, Qualit e Dopo-Vendita per consegnare funzionalit robuste sul mercato. Luogo di lavoro: Cadro (Lugano), con occasionali viaggi Riferimento: Head of R&D Orario di lavoro: 100%
descriptionByLocale.en: To strengthen our product innovation, we are seeking a Research & Development Engineer with solid expertise in power electronics control and embedded systems for high-reliability industrial products (UPS or similar). You are a hands-on engineer with strong analytical skills and lab practice, able to design, implement, and validate control algorithms and embedded firmware/hardware, collaborating closely with Production, Quality, and After-Sales to deliver robust features to market. Workplace: Cadro (Lugano), with occasional travel Reporting to: Head of R&D Working rate: 100%
descriptionByLocale.de: Um unsere Produktinnovation zu stken, suchen wir einen Forschungs- und Entwicklungsingenieur mit solider Expertise in der Steuerung von Leistungselektronik und eingebetteten Systemen fr hochverfgliche industrielle Produkte (UPS oder hnliche). Sie sind ein handlungsorientierter Ingenieur mit starken analytischen Fhigkeiten und Laborpraxis, der in der Lage ist, Steuerungsalgorithmen und eingebettete Firmware/Hardware zu entwerfen, umzusetzen und zu validieren, und sich eng mit Produktion, Qualitt und After-Sales abzustimmen, um robuste Funktionen auf den Markt zu bringen. Arbeitsplatz: Cadro (Lugano), mit gelegentlichen Reisen Berichtsgebern: Head of R&D Arbeitszeit: 100%
descriptionByLocale.fr: Pour renforcer l'innovation de nos produits, nous recherchons un Ingnieur de Recherche et Dveloppement avec des expertises solides en contrle lectronique de puissance et systmes embarqus pour des produits industriels hauts rendements (UPS ou similaires). Vous tes un ingnieur pratique avec des aptitudes analytiques fortes et une pratique de laboratoire, capable de concevoir, d'implmenter et de valider des algorithmes de contrle et du firmware/hardware embarqu, en travaillant en tanche avec la Production, la Qualit et les Services Aprs-Vente pour livrer des fonctionnalits robustes sur le march. Lieu de travail : Cadro (Lugano), avec des voyages occasionnels Rfrence : Head of R&D Heure de travail : 100%

descriptionByLocale.it: Tecnico Post Vendita — Centiel, Cadro (Lugano), Canton Ticino, Svizzera. Riportando a: Responsabile post vendita. Per supportare la nostra crescita e rafforzare il nostro reparto post-vendita, stiamo cercando un tecnico post-vendita motivato e competente con un forte background tecnico e una mentalità incentrata sul cliente. Luogo di lavoro: Cadro (Lugano), Svizzera Riporto a: After Sales Manager Centiel è un'azienda svizzera con sede a Cadro (Lugano), specializzata nella progettazione e produzione di sistemi di continuità (UPS) e soluzioni di protezione dell'alimentazione. L'azienda sviluppa un'innovativa tecnologia UPS modulare trifase per applicazioni mission-critical tra cui data center, ospedali, impianti industriali e infrastrutture di telecomunicazioni. I prodotti Centiel sono noti per la loro elevata efficienza, affidabilità e scalabilità e servono clienti in tutta Europa e nel mondo. Luogo di lavoro: Cadro (Lugano), Svizzera, Via alla Stampa 15, CH-6965. Candidarsi tramite: https://www.centiel.com/careers/

descriptionByLocale.de: Kundendiensttechniker – Centiel, Cadro (Lugano), Kanton Tessin, Schweiz. Bericht an: After Sales Manager. Um unser Wachstum zu unterstützen und unsere After-Sales-Abteilung zu stärken, suchen wir einen motivierten und qualifizierten After-Sales-Techniker mit einem starken technischen Hintergrund und einer kundenorientierten Denkweise. Arbeitsplatz: Cadro (Lugano), Schweiz Unterstellt an: After Sales Manager Centiel ist ein Schweizer Unternehmen mit Hauptsitz in Cadro (Lugano), das sich auf die Entwicklung und Herstellung von unterbrechungsfreien Stromversorgungssystemen (USV) und Stromschutzlösungen spezialisiert hat. Das Unternehmen entwickelt innovative dreiphasige modulare USV-Technologie für unternehmenskritische Anwendungen, darunter Rechenzentren, Krankenhäuser, Industrieanlagen und Telekommunikationsinfrastruktur. Die Produkte von Centiel sind für ihre hohe Effizienz, Zuverlässigkeit und Skalierbarkeit bekannt und bedienen Kunden in ganz Europa und weltweit. Arbeitsplatz: Cadro (Lugano), Schweiz, Via alla Stampa 15, CH-6965. Bewerben Sie sich über: https://www.centiel.com/careers/
descriptionByLocale.fr: Technicien après-vente — Centiel, Cadro (Lugano), Canton du Tessin, Suisse. Rattaché à : Responsable Après-Vente. Pour accompagner notre croissance et renforcer notre service après-vente, nous recherchons un technicien après-vente motivé et compétent, doté d'une solide formation technique et d'un état d'esprit centré sur le client. Lieu de travail : Cadro (Lugano), Suisse Relevant de : Responsable après-vente Centiel est une société suisse dont le siège est à Cadro (Lugano), spécialisée dans la conception et la fabrication de systèmes d'alimentation sans coupure (UPS) et de solutions de protection électrique. La société développe une technologie UPS modulaire triphasée innovante pour les applications critiques, notamment les centres de données, les hôpitaux, les installations industrielles et les infrastructures de télécommunications. Les produits Centiel sont connus pour leur haute efficacité, leur fiabilité et leur évolutivité, au service de clients dans toute l'Europe et dans le monde. Lieu de travail : Cadro (Lugano), Suisse, Via alla Stampa 15, CH-6965. Postulez via : https://www.centiel.com/careers/
